sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110797" key="fila/grion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλάγριον</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλαγρ-ίανον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n110797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage,</tr_> invented by Philagrius, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope> </bibl>; also <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ Φιλαγρίανον</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάλαγμα</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
